element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Combat against grounded and airborne enemies
Strategic weapon selection for different enemy types
Charge attack mechanic for powerful strikes
Risk/reward chest opening; elderly man or duck transformation
Levels 1-5 repeated with special weapon acquisition requirement
Required to access Lucifer's chamber; gating mechanic
End-game challenge; culmination of all mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Treasure chest discovery with beneficial items
Safe platforming sections between enemy clusters
typical_tension_triggers: Curse item (magician) transformation risk from chests
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Arcade-paced action with spikes during boss encounters and mandatory second playthrough; relief provided by optional treasure hunting between combat sections

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Jump-triggered treasure chests at specific ground locations; optional discovery mechanic encourages exploration
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Treasure chests hidden at certain jump-spots; player must discover and fire weapon at chest to reveal contents (weapons, armor, or curses)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to movement, basic weapon combat, and directional firing mechanics; moderate enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Weapon variety and treasure chest system introduced; escalating enemy types and platform complexity; curse transformation risk adds stakes to optional exploration
difficulty_curve.late_game: Mandatory second playthrough of Levels 1-5 with heightened difficulty; special weapon acquisition gating; boss encounters (Beelzebub, Lucifer) as final progression gatekeepers
notable_spikes: Second playthrough initiation (difficulty resets levels but increases enemy challenge)

notable_level_patterns.description: Six distinct levels, each presenting themed undead/demonic enemies and platforming challenges; horizontal-axis progression with optional vertical exploration for treasures

Completion of Levels 1-5 once triggers automatic progression loop: player is returned to Level 1 for a second playthrough where special weapon appears; this special weapon becomes mandatory gating requirement for final boss access
Hidden chests at specific jump-spots provide weapons, gold armor upgrades, or transformation curses; creates risk/reward tension in optional exploration
Beelzebub must be defeated before access to Lucifer's chamber; final progression gated by both special weapon requirement and mandatory boss encounter
